# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test improvement
- [ ] Security hardening

## Validation

- [ ] Ran `./Invoke-Tests.ps1`
- [ ] Added or updated tests where relevant
- [ ] No generated artifacts are committed (`reports/`, `test-reports/`, `baselines/`)
- [ ] No credentials, tenant IDs, or sensitive report data included

## Checklist

- [ ] I followed the contributing guidelines
- [ ] I updated documentation for behavior changes
- [ ] I confirmed this remains read-only against tenant configuration
